3229460.name: My Puppy
3229460.description:
My Puppy is a puppy-raising game. The player adopts a puppy and through daily training and interaction, develops different attributes and eventually chooses the right career for the puppy.

After entering the name and choosing the breed of the dog, players have 22 weeks(game time) to explore a map that has various locations including a home, forest, garden, grass field, etc. There are many actions for players to choose from in each location, and each action can increase the value of different attributes of the dog like strength, charisma, perception, etc. There are 10 energy values in each week and each action will cost 1-3 energy values. In the end, after 22 weeks, if the values of attributes meet the standard, players could have corresponding endings, choosing different careers for the dog.
3229460.supported_languages:
英语*
*具有完全音频支持的语言
